name: Spicy Vegetable Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cottage cheese, milk and lemon juice in a blender.
2. Cover and blend on high speed about 1 minute, stopping occasionally to scrape sides until smooth.
3. Add mustard, onion powder and curry powder. Cover and blend for an additional 1 minute.
4. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour (but no longer than 3 days).
5. Serve with raw vegetables. Yields: 1 cup dip
